name: fs_ls
description: List files in a directory. Returns file names and whether each is a directory.

path.description: Directory path to list. Defaults to current directory.

name: fs_read
description: Read the contents of a text file.

name: fs_write
description: Write content to a file. Creates parent directories if needed.

name: fs_search
description: Search for files by name or content using ripgrep.

query.description: Search query (searches file names and content)

path.description: Directory to search in. Defaults to /workspace.

name: exec_run
description: Run a shell command and return stdout, stderr, and exit code.

command.description: Shell command to run (supports pipes, redirects, etc.)

name: exec_script
description: Run a script in Python, Bash, or Node.js.

name: kv_get
description: Get a value from the agent's key-value memory store.

key.description: Key to look up (supports namespaces like 'user:name')

name: kv_set
description: Store a key-value pair in the agent's memory.

name: web_read
description: Read a web page and return clean structured text (not raw HTML).

name: net_fetch
description: Make an HTTP API request (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE).

name: doc_read
description: Read any document (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, etc.) and return structured text.

name: pkg_need
description: Ensure system packages are installed. Say what you need, the system handles it.

packages.description: List of package names to ensure are installed

name: notify_send
description: Send a notification to the user.

urgent.description: Whether the notification is urgent. Defaults to false.
